attach-zugferd-xml.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF using File Attachment Annotation
attach-zugferd-xml.description: Demonstrates how to embed a ZUGFeRD XML invoice into a PDF as a file attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

zugferd-invoice-pdf.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF by Embedding XML
zugferd-invoice-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a simple invoice PDF and embed ZUGFeRD XML data as an attached file using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

validate-zugferd-pdfa3.title: Validate PDF/A-3b (ZUGFeRD) Conformance
validate-zugferd-pdfa3.description: Creates a sample PDF, embeds a dummy ZUGFeRD XML file, converts the document to PDF/A‑3b and validates it against the PDF/A‑3b (ZUGFeRD) specification.

extract-zugferd-xml.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-zugferd-xml.description: Demonstrates how to extract an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file from a PDF and save it to disk.

update-zugferd-xml.title: Update ZUGFeRD XML Attachment in PDF
update-zugferd-xml.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing ZUGFeRD XML file embedded in a PDF with new invoice data using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

remove-zugferd-attachment.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
remove-zugferd-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to delete the ZUGFeRD embedded XML file from a PDF while preserving the rest of the document.

add-custom-metadata-zugferd.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
add-custom-metadata-zugferd.description: Creates a sample PDF, then adds custom metadata entries such as project code and department, and saves the updated PDF.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords.description: Creates a sample PDF (simulating a ZUGFeRD document) and encrypts it using both user and owner passwords.

add-document-expiry-javascript.title: Add Document-Level JavaScript Expiry Action
add-document-expiry-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to add a document‑level JavaScript action that closes the PDF after a specified expiry date.

javascript-open-action-page-ten.title: Set JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page Ten
javascript-open-action-page-ten.description: Demonstrates how to assign a JavaScript open action that jumps to page ten when the PDF is opened.

add-page-level-javascript.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-page-level-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF page that shows an alert when the page becomes visible.

calculate-total-order-amount.title: Calculate Total Order Amount Using JavaScript in PDF Form
calculate-total-order-amount.description: Demonstrates adding form fields to a PDF and using JavaScript actions to compute a line‑item amount and the total order amount.

add-document-level-javascript-autosave.title: Add Document-Level JavaScript for Auto‑Save
add-document-level-javascript-autosave.description: Creates a PDF, then adds a document‑level JavaScript that triggers automatic saving at regular intervals.

draw-star-low-level.title: Draw Custom Star Shape Using Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-star-low-level.description: Creates a PDF and draws a five‑point star at specified coordinates by inserting low‑level PDF operators.

change-line-width.title: Change Line Width Operators in PDF
change-line-width.description: Demonstrates how to modify SetLineWidth operators in an existing PDF to change line width from 1 point to 3 points.

delete-pdf-operators.title: Delete PDF Operators to Remove Background Graphics
delete-pdf-operators.description: Shows how to delete specific operators from a page's content stream, useful for removing unwanted background graphics.

replace-text-show-operators.title: Replace Text in PDF by Modifying ShowText Operators
replace-text-show-operators.description: Creates a PDF, then replaces occurrences of a specific string by locating ShowText operators and substituting new text.

line-graph-distinct-stroke.title: Line Graph with Distinct Stroke Styles
line-graph-distinct-stroke.description: Creates a PDF containing a line graph with three data series, each using a different stroke style (solid, dashed, dotted).

embed-graph-vector.title: Embed Graph as Vector Graphic in PDF
embed-graph-vector.description: Creates a PDF, generates a Graph object, and embeds it directly on the page as a vector graphic.

combine-graphs-2x2-grid.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page (2x2 Grid)
combine-graphs-2x2-grid.description: Creates a PDF with a single page containing four graphs arranged in a two‑by‑two grid.

batch-invoice-graph.title: Batch Generate Invoice PDFs with Sales Graphs
batch-invoice-graph.description: Creates a template PDF and generates multiple invoice PDFs, each containing a sales bar graph for an order.

add-file-attachment.title: Add File Attachment with Description to PDF
add-file-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to embed a PDF file as an attachment annotation with a description and MIME type.

attach-multiple-files.title: Attach Multiple Files with Custom MIME Types and Descriptions
attach-multiple-files.description: Demonstrates how to embed several files into a PDF, each with its own MIME type and description.

list-pdf-attachments.title: List PDF Attachments and Their Sizes
list-pdf-attachments.description: Creates a PDF with an attachment, then reads the PDF and prints each attachment's name and size.

remove-attachment.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-attachment.description: Creates a PDF with two embedded files, then removes one attachment by its filename while preserving the other.

update-pdf-attachment-description.title: Update PDF Attachment Description
update-pdf-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates how to modify the description of an embedded file attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-metadata.title: Set PDF Document Metadata and Custom Property
set-pdf-metadata.description: Creates a PDF, then sets its title, author, and adds a custom property for the invoice number.

read-custom-metadata-log.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata and Write to Log
read-custom-metadata-log.description: Creates a sample PDF with custom metadata, then reads the custom metadata and writes it to a log file for auditing.

aes256-encryption.title: Apply AES‑256 Encryption with User and Owner Passwords
aes256-encryption.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, setting both user and owner passwords for access control.

set-pdf-permissions-print-only.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Printing Only
set-pdf-permissions-print-only.description: Creates a PDF, then encrypts it to allow printing while disabling content copying and annotation modifications.

verify-pdf-digital-signature.title: Verify PDF Digital Signature and Retrieve Signer Details
verify-pdf-digital-signature.description: Creates a PDF with a signature field, then checks for signature compromise and lists signature field information.

convert-pdf-to-docx.title: Convert PDF to DOCX preserving layout
convert-pdf-to-docx.description: Creates a sample PDF with text and a table, then converts it to a DOCX file while keeping the original layout, fonts, and tables.

pdf-to-html-embedded-base64.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Base64 Images
pdf-to-html-embedded-base64.description: Creates a sample PDF and converts it to HTML, embedding raster images as Base64‑encoded data URIs using HtmlSaveOptions.

pdf-page-to-png-300dpi.title: Convert PDF Page to PNG Image at 300 DPI
pdf-page-to-png-300dpi.description: Creates a sample PDF and converts its first page to a high‑resolution PNG image (300 DPI).

batch-convert-pdf-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
batch-convert-pdf-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to create sample PDFs, enumerate PDF files in a directory, and convert each page to JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf.

export-selected-pages.title: Export Selected PDF Pages as Separate Files
export-selected-pages.description: Creates a sample PDF, then extracts specified pages into individual PDF files while keeping original page size and orientation.

merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge Multiple PDFs Preserving Bookmarks
merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Creates two sample PDFs each containing a bookmark, then merges them into a single PDF while keeping the bookmark hierarchy intact.

split-pdf-into-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages
split-pdf-into-pages.description: Creates a sample PDF and then splits it into separate one‑page PDF files.

extract-text-with-formatting.title: Extract Text from PDF with Line Breaks and Spacing
extract-text-with-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text from a PDF while preserving line breaks and spacing using TextExtractionOptions.

extract-embedded-images.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF
extract-embedded-images.description: Creates a sample PDF with an embedded image, then extracts each image preserving its original format and resolution.

export-pdf-form-fields.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields.description: Creates a sample PDF with a form field, then extracts the field values and prints them as a JSON string.

populate-form-from-json-flatten.title: Populate PDF Form from JSON and Flatten
populate-form-from-json-flatten.description: Creates a PDF with a form field, fills it using JSON data, and flattens the form to make the content non‑editable.

add-javascript-open-action.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page Five
add-javascript-open-action.description: Demonstrates how to add a JavaScript open action that navigates to page five when the PDF is opened.

add-javascript-print-dialog.title: Add JavaScript Print Dialog on PDF Open
add-javascript-print-dialog.description: Creates a PDF and adds a JavaScript action that automatically opens the print dialog when the document is opened.

set-pdf-author-dynamic.title: Set PDF Author Dynamically from System User
set-pdf-author-dynamic.description: Creates a sample PDF, then sets its Author metadata to the current system user and saves the result.

hide-field-with-checkbox.title: Hide Form Field with JavaScript Based on Checkbox State
hide-field-with-checkbox.description: Creates a PDF with a checkbox and a text field, then attaches JavaScript to hide the text field when the checkbox is unchecked.

multi-column-text-layout.title: Create Multi-Column Text Layout Using PDF Operators
multi-column-text-layout.description: Demonstrates how to configure ColumnInfo and use TextBuilder to render text in multiple columns on a PDF page.

compress-pdf-images.title: Compress Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
compress-pdf-images.description: Demonstrates how to compress images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf OptimizationOptions to reduce file size while keeping acceptable visual quality.

set-pdfa2b-compliance.title: Set PDF/A‑2b Compliance When Saving PDF
set-pdfa2b-compliance.description: Creates a sample PDF and saves it with PDF/A‑2b compliance for long‑term archival.

add-pdfa-xmp-metadata.title: Add PDF/A XMP Metadata (Document ID and Creator Tool)
add-pdfa-xmp-metadata.description: Creates a sample PDF, then adds required XMP metadata entries for PDF/A compliance such as Document ID and Creator Tool, and saves the result.

validate-pdfa-after-zugferd-attachment.title: Validate PDF/A Compliance After Adding ZUGFeRD Attachment
validate-pdfa-after-zugferd-attachment.description: Creates a PDF/A document, embeds a ZUGFeRD XML file, and uses Aspose.Pdf's compliance checker to verify the PDF remains PDF/A compliant.

convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD attachment to PDF/A-3u preserving XML
convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.description: Creates a PDF containing an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file and converts it to PDF/A‑3u while keeping the attachment intact.

create-pdf-invoice-embed-zugferd.title: Create PDF Invoice and Embed ZUGFeRD XML
create-pdf-invoice-embed-zugferd.description: Generates a simple PDF invoice, creates ZUGFeRD XML from an order object, and embeds the XML into the PDF as an embedded file.

batch-generate-zugferd-pdfs.title: Batch Generate ZUGFeRD‑Compliant PDFs from CSV and Embed XML
batch-generate-zugferd-pdfs.description: Creates invoice PDFs from a CSV list, embeds the corresponding ZUGFeRD XML file into each PDF, and saves them.

embed-custom-font-graph.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font in PDF Graph
embed-custom-font-graph.description: Demonstrates how to embed a custom TrueType font into a PDF and use it for graph titles and axis labels so text renders correctly on all devices.

subset-embedded-font.title: Subset Embedded Custom Font in PDF
subset-embedded-font.description: Creates a PDF using a custom font, embeds it, then subsets the font to keep only the glyphs actually used, reducing file size.

hide-toolbar-menu-bar.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar via JavaScript
hide-toolbar-menu-bar.description: Creates a PDF and adds document‑level JavaScript that hides the toolbar and menu bar when the PDF is opened.

javascript-page-transitions.title: Add JavaScript Page Transitions to PDF
javascript-page-transitions.description: Creates a PDF and adds JavaScript that defines page transition effects, duration and style for each page.

add-javascript-calculation.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Fields
add-javascript-calculation.description: Creates a PDF, adds price fields and a total field, and attaches JavaScript to automatically calculate the total price.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark Behind PDF Content
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a semi‑transparent text watermark behind the existing page content on each page using low‑level WatermarkArtifact operators.

apply-form-filling-security.title: Apply Form Filling Only Security to PDF
apply-form-filling-security.description: Creates a PDF, then encrypts it so only form filling is allowed while editing, printing, and content extraction are disabled.

remove-javascript-actions.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF
remove-javascript-actions.description: Creates a PDF with a JavaScript link annotation, then removes all JavaScript actions to improve security.

list-javascript-actions.title: List JavaScript Actions in PDF
list-javascript-actions.description: Creates a sample PDF with document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions, then enumerates and prints all JavaScript scripts for auditing purposes.

pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF
pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Creates a sample PDF and converts each page into a multi-page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-png-thumbnails.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails.description: Creates a sample PDF and generates small PNG thumbnail images for each page using Aspose.Pdf ThumbnailDevice.

embed-audio-javascript.title: Embed Audio with JavaScript Playback in PDF
embed-audio-javascript.description: Creates a PDF, embeds a WAV audio file as a sound annotation, and adds a button that plays the audio via JavaScript.

add-encrypted-attachment.title: Add Encrypted Attachment to PDF
add-encrypted-attachment.description: Creates a PDF, adds a text file attachment, encrypts the PDF so only authorized users can open it.

set-pdf-dates.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates
set-pdf-dates.description: Creates a PDF, then updates its creation and modification timestamps to the current processing time.

draw-pie-chart-operators.title: Draw Pie Chart Using Low‑Level PDF Operators
draw-pie-chart-operators.description: Demonstrates how to create a simple pie chart by adding low‑level drawing operators directly to a PDF page.

add-javascript-password-prompt.title: Add JavaScript Prompt for Password to PDF
add-javascript-password-prompt.description: Creates a PDF, then adds a JavaScript action that asks the user for a password before showing the document content.

signature-field-js-validation.title: Add Signature Field with JavaScript Validation
signature-field-js-validation.description: Creates a PDF, adds a digital signature field and attaches JavaScript that validates the signature when the field is activated.

export-annotations-fdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to FDF (XFDF) File
export-annotations-fdf.description: Creates a PDF with a text annotation, then exports all annotations to an FDF (XFDF) file for external processing or archiving.

import-fdf-flatten-form.title: Import FDF Data and Flatten PDF Form
import-fdf-flatten-form.description: Demonstrates importing field values from an FDF file into a PDF form and flattening the form to make the fields non‑editable.

set-pdf-language.title: Set PDF Document Language for Accessibility
set-pdf-language.description: Creates a sample PDF, then sets the document's language property using TaggedContent to improve accessibility for screen readers.

toggle-form-section-visibility.title: Toggle Form Section Visibility with JavaScript
toggle-form-section-visibility.description: Shows how to add a checkbox and an optional text field to a PDF and use JavaScript to show or hide the optional section based on the checkbox selection.

create-toc-with-outlines.title: Create Table of Contents Page with Clickable Outline Entries
create-toc-with-outlines.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a Table of Contents page and clickable outline entries linking to document headings.

batch-password-protect-pdfs.title: Batch Apply Password Protection to PDFs
batch-password-protect-pdfs.description: Creates sample PDFs and then encrypts all PDFs in the current folder with identical user and owner passwords.

dynamic-header-footer.title: Dynamic Header and Footer with JavaScript
dynamic-header-footer.description: Creates a PDF and adds JavaScript that inserts a header and footer showing the current page number each time a page is opened.

add-auto-close-javascript.title: Add Auto-Close JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-close-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript that automatically closes the PDF window after a timeout.

extract-zugferd-xml-validate.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF and Validate against XSD
extract-zugferd-xml-validate.description: Creates a PDF with an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file, extracts the XML, and validates it against the ZUGFeRD XSD schema.

batch-text-extraction-index.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs and Build Simple Search Index
batch-text-extraction-index.description: Creates sample PDFs, extracts their text using TextAbsorber, and builds an in‑memory keyword index for quick retrieval.

layered-graphics-transparency.title: Create PDF with Layered Graphics and Transparency
layered-graphics-transparency.description: Demonstrates how to add multiple layers with semi‑transparent shapes to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
